race.comment: CAT CALL (3) resumes and has been gelded. The speedy galloper draws well and is right up to this if presented forward. Has won this course/distance and is well placed. The betting will be key. CALL TO COURAGE (6) is a promising local who finished in the placings over 1015m at Ballina at her last appearance. Has placed 2/2 fresh and has plenty of scope for improvement. Should be hard to stop. HERECOMESANTORINI (9) improved last start over 1000m here on the turf, beaten only 1.75 lengths. Has the rail and handy 2kg claim and has been placed on the poly. DUSAN (2) and BEITSOO (11) both resume and have won fresh. The former draws to advantage and the latter benefits from a 3kg claim but will need some luck.
